title: Netify Device Discovery Processor Configuration
description: JSON Schema for the Netify Device Discovery Processor plugin configuration.

format.description: Default payload format used for all outputs unless overridden in sinks.

compressor.description: Default compression policy used for all outputs unless overridden in sinks.

max_confidence.description: Confidence threshold (0-100) required before discovery stops for a device.

max_devices.description: Maximum number of devices to track in memory. 0 for unlimited.

max_device_age.description: Maximum idle time (seconds) before a device is purged from memory.

max_ja4_clients.description: Maximum number of extracted JA4 client hashes to collect on any given MAC address.

max_mdns_services.description: Maximum number of extracted mDNS service strings to collect on any given MAC address.

max_http_user_agents.description: Maximum number of extracted HTTP user agent strings to collect on any given MAC address.

max_ssdp_user_agents.description: Maximum number of extracted SSDP user agent strings to collect on any given MAC address.

path_device_cache.description: Filesystem path for persistent device cache.

process_all_macs.description: If false, only local/unicast MAC addresses are processed.

device_mac_ignore.description: List of MAC addresses to exclude from discovery.

enable.description: Enables or disables this Netify Clound discovery engine.

additionalProperties.description: The specific channel or topic for the target (e.g., 'aggregate').

enable.description: Enables or disables this specific sink channel.

formatType.description: The serialization format for the data payload.

compressorType.description: The compression algorithm applied to the payload.
